verse.verse_0: In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful.
verse.verse_2: And [by] the night when it covers with darkness,
verse.verse_3: Your Lord has not taken leave of you, [O Muhammad], nor has He detested [you].
verse.verse_4: And the Hereafter is better for you than the first [life].
verse.verse_5: And your Lord is going to give you, and you will be satisfied.
verse.verse_6: Did He not find you an orphan and give [you] refuge?
verse.verse_7: And He found you lost and guided [you],
verse.verse_8: And He found you poor and made [you] self-sufficient.
verse.verse_9: So as for the orphan, do not oppress [him].
verse.verse_10: And as for the petitioner, do not repel [him].
verse.verse_11: But as for the favor of your Lord, report [it].
